positive: A detailed, vintage botanical illustration of exotic flowers and ferns, rendered in the style of a 19th-century scientific engraving. Highly intricate cross-hatching, sepia tones, elegant, natural history plate, on aged parchment paper, perfect symmetry, scientific drawing.
